Workflow.Name: Triggered Flow - Task Closed
Workflow.Description: When a GRAIL Task moves to a non-active state in it's Business Process Flow (GRAIL Task Timeline). Set Task Status to Closed. This will then result in main fields on the record becoming locked due to a business rule. Also adds a note to the Task Timeline in both closed and cancelled cases.

Description.description: When a GRAIL Task moves to a non-active state in it's Business Process Flow (GRAIL Task Timeline). Set Task Status to Closed. This will then result in main fields on the record becoming locked due to a business rule. Also adds a note to the Task Timeline in both closed and cancelled cases.
